overview: CANISTERS is a retro-themed ICP canister management dashboard with a CRT monitor aesthetic. Users can log in with Internet Identity to track, create, and manage their canisters — monitoring cycle balances, managing controllers, and topping up from an in-app ICP account.
features: Internet Identity login with retro boot-sequence splash screen
Track and manage ICP canisters with cycle balance monitoring
Create new canisters in-app with upfront cost estimation and initial cycles seeding
Top up canister cycles by converting ICP from your in-app account
Dashboard showing recent activity and lowest-balance canisters
Controller management: add/remove controllers with app controller badge
Retro CRT monitor UI: phosphor green text, scanlines, CRT glow, flicker effects
Paginated canister list with real-time search and ◆CTRL/◇NO-CTRL badges
Transaction history for ICP transfers and cycle top-ups
